created_for: Jack Martin MSc thesis healthcare accessibility study

sources.huisartsenpost: RIVM/VZinfo map Locaties huisartsenspoedposten 2025, peildatum december 2025, based on Benchmark huisartsenposten 2024 and RIVM edits through January 2026.
sources.general_practitioner: OpenStreetMap via Overpass API; tags amenity=doctors, healthcare=doctor, healthcare:speciality/name huisarts/general practitioner.
sources.hospital_emergency_proxy: OpenStreetMap via Overpass API; amenity=hospital or healthcare=hospital. Treat as emergency-care proxy until official SEH-only list is extracted.
sources.hospital: RIVM/VZinfo SEH travel-time map, 2025. Includes 24/7 basic SEH and locations in the official map location file; see hospital_type for opening classification.
